titleStmt.title: SII 23.584: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 584. (A.R. No. 584 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the 3rd and 4th tiers of the same base

summary.p: This is also built in at the beginning. This seems to record the confirmation of a grant of lands made probably by Eṛasiddharasar some time previously to twenty Brāhmaṇas, ten from the south and ten from the north—settled in the agrahāra, by the chief's son Madhurāntaka Pottappi Chōḷa Vimalāditya on the day of Chittirai-Vishu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—ndraccaturvedimaṅkalattukku melellai kiḷikkūṭṭumalai Ekatirttam tenkarai Eḻuruvak kāmaccoḻa nallūrkiṭpaṭak kiḻakkum vaṭakku periyamalaiyaka maṭṭutta
—meṟkkum teṟkku pākkai Ellaikku vaṭakkumāka Ivvūril nāl pālellaikkuḷḷuḷḷa nañcai puñcai nilamum kāṭum meṭum maṭuvum Āṟuka
—ṇar patinmaṟkkum vaṭukabrāhmaṇar patiṉmaṟkkum Āka Irupatu bhaṭṭarkaḷukkum Ivāṇṭaic cittirai viṣuvile Ivvūr Ācantra tāram Akaramāka dharmmadānam pa
—kuṭutta Ivvūr Itil Ellaikkuḷḷellaā mibhaṭṭarkaḷukku Akaramākave nāṉum kuṭuttu In=ta śilālipitam paṇṇuvitten Erasiddharasar makan(m) maturāntaka pottappicoḻan vimalāditya devanen .
Digital edition of SII 23.584 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
